_comment: Provenance metadata for Heaven-Defying Bead / Pearl (逆天珠). Auto-generated from canon database. Every item answers: Where did this originate? Who made it? When? Why? How old? What cultivation? Current owner? Known history?
name: Heaven-Defying Bead / Pearl
origin: Found as a youth inside Heng Yue Sect stone bead; sent back through time by future clone Lu Mo via Dream Dao
abilities: Five Elements pattern bead — core of the original 9-part set
Stores nascent souls; contains Third-Step divine abilities
Sentient / destiny-bound / fuses with primordial spirit
known_facts: Root cause of the great war in the Ancient Immortal Domain
Cross-novel artifact — also wielded by Su Ming and Xuan Zang
Bestowed by Seven-Colored Immortal Venerable to Realm-Sealing Supreme
Fuses with Wang Lin's primordial spirit by the end
source: Ch.8 (novel, Donghua S1E2); Fandom wiki; Baidu Baike
